personality: 3 Editorial Mobile LIGHT with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A highly refined, editorial command center with cinematic glass layers that feels like a luxury real estate brochure meeting enterprise utility.

spacing.rule: Editorial spacing rhythms with generous vertical breathing room. Cards and sections must never feel cramped. Use intentional whitespace to spotlight luxury.

do's: Use frosted glass overlay on the hero villa image card.
Use blur for the bottom tab bar and sticky headers over scrolling content.
Apply translucent tinted base (>=70% surface) behind glass surfaces to ensure text contrast.
dont's: Never blur body text regions, form fields, or standard list rows.
Don't stack more than 2 glass surfaces.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Executive KPI Dashboard providing an immediate macro-view of luxury villa construction progress, financial health, and urgent bottlenecks.

states.empty: Illustration or large brand icon with a prompt to set up a project.

screens.layout: Header: Project selector (Initials RP avatar). Hero Area: Full-width card with the Villa Aurelia exterior photo, overlaid with a glass panel showing overall progress % and status. KPI Grid: 2-column or wide cards displaying schedule variance, budget vs actual, pending approvals. Recent Activity List: Stacked rows with site photo thumbnails and quick updates.

screens.name: Projects
screens.purpose: Comprehensive view of all active villas, with deep-dive to stages and team.

states.empty: No active projects. Text: 'No projects available.' with Add Project button.

screens.layout: List of large cards per project. Each card features an image, villa name, client name, and a progress ring (brandPrimary). Tapping leads to a detailed tabbed view: Timeline, Team, BOQ.

screens.name: Site
screens.purpose: Field operations hub for submitting daily reports, uploading site photos, and performing quality checklists.

states.error: Failed to load site data. Retry.

screens.layout: Tabbed or segmented control: Daily Logs, Quality Checklist, Snags. Daily Logs: Form input with photo upload grid. Quality Checklist: Scrollable list of items (Foundation, RCC) with pass/fail toggle and remarks.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Role-based settings and secondary module access (Billing, CRM, Procurement).
screens.layout: Simple list layout. User profile header (glass or surfaceSecondary), followed by menu rows for other modules with Feather icons.

project_cover_2.alt: Modern villa showcasing luxury and elegance

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT NO BLUE/PURPLE: Do not use any indigo, violet, blue, or purple (including navy) anywhere. Use the provided Charcoal and Gold/Bronze palette.
Typography: Use Playfair Display for all headers, titles, and KPI numeric values. Use Inter (sans-serif) for body text, labels, and forms.
Visual Hierarchy: The hero image (Villa Aurelia) MUST use a gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (top to bottom) if text is overlaid, or use a frosted glass container over the image.
BOQ & Tables: Build professional, clean tables for BOQ & Cost Control using surfaceSecondary alternating row colors or subtle dividers, right-aligned numbers, and clear highlighting of overruns.
Stage Timeline: Design the 23 construction stages using a sleek vertical stepper timeline with elegant typography and gold status rings.
Image Fallback: If a user logo/avatar is needed and no image is available, use Initials (e.g., 'RP') inside a brandTertiary tinted circle. Never use generic user icons.
Cards: Avoid heavy shadows. Use a 1pt border (border) with surfaceSecondary and shadow tier 1 for a refined, paper-like editorial feel.
Haptics: Serialize haptics for tab changes, form submissions, and quality checklist pass/fail toggles.
